content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:claude/claude-opus-4-7-max

## Summary

Reviewed the full branch delta against origin/master. The fix correctly replaces the hardcoded 300s timeout in RequirementsCliService::invoke_stage with a config-driven per-role timeout. `BackendRole::to_policy_role()` is added to src/shared/domain.rs with the exact mapping the bead specifies. `AgentExecutionService::with_effective_config` and `timeout_for_role` helpers mirror how workflow stage invocations resolve timeouts via BackendPolicyService, and both production builders (`build_requirements_service_for_selector`, `build_agent_execution_service_for_config`) plumb EffectiveConfig through. The integration test exercises per-role timeouts on two different backend families and asserts the values flow through for draft (Claude/planner), review (Codex/reviewer), and project-seed (Claude/planner) invocations without asserting a blanket 3600s. `target.backend.family` is used so operator overrides are honored. No hardcoded Duration::from_secs(300) remain in src/contexts/requirements_drafting/service.rs. The only other 300s literal in the codebase (daemon_loop.rs lease_ttl) is unrelated. No real bugs, correctness gaps, or safety concerns found.

## Amendments

None.
